title: Walk-Forward Backtest Skeleton v2 — Readiness Decision

1_typescript_engine_created.detail: src/lib/backtest/WalkForwardEngine.ts created with all 5 required exports: buildWalkForwardSkeleton, getRegimeContextForDate, buildMonthlyRebalanceSchedule, rankCandidatesRuleOnly, computeTurnoverStats

2_resolveCurrentDate_used.detail: resolveCurrentDate() called in buildWalkForwardSkeleton(), getRegimeContextForDate(), rankCandidatesRuleOnly(). No hardcoded date cap.

3_500day_lookback_contract.detail: T05B_LOOKBACK_DAYS = 500 exported from WalkForwardEngine.ts. Default config uses this value.

4_monthly_rebalance_skeleton.detail: buildMonthlyRebalanceSchedule() is deterministic, handles empty range, handles no trading days, embedded in buildWalkForwardSkeleton() output.

5_persisted_regime_read_only.detail: regimeContextMap injected as Map<string, PersistedRegimeContext>. Engine never queries DB. Never mutates context map.

6_explicit_missing_state.detail: getRegimeContextForDate() returns dataAvailabilityFlag: 'MISSING' with isAvailable: false when no prior context exists. Never assumes BULL or valid.

7_forbidden_fields_absent.detail: containsForbiddenKey() test passes over all output. No buy/sell/roi/alpha/edge/profit/recommendation/outperform in field names.

8_no_h001_h012.detail: H_PATTERN = /H0(0[1-9]|1[0-2])\b/ not present in engine output JSON. No ExperimentRegistry references.

9_tests_pass.detail: 45/45 T-05B tests PASS. 8 suites / 134 tests PASS in full regression (T-12b + T-03 + T-04 + T-09 + T-11 + T-05B).

10_guardrail_complete.detail: 14/14 guardrail checks PASS. All JSON artifacts parse successfully.

11_no_strategy_validation_performed.detail: No ROI, no win-rate, no alpha, no edge computation. All performance fields are null placeholders.

12_no_production_behavior_changed.detail: Only new files added: WalkForwardEngine.ts and test. No existing production files modified.

P0_Immediate: T-05C or T-06: Build persisted MarketRegimeResult context loader that provides a populated Map<string, PersistedRegimeContext> for WalkForwardEngine injection
T-05C or T-06: Replace mock candidates with real StockQuote-based PIT-safe candidate selection
P1_Next: P4-05 Data Backfill: backfill InstitutionalChip, MonthlyRevenue, FinancialReport for >= 500 trading days
Integrate WalkForwardEngine.ts into DailyOpsReport observability layer
DoNotDo: ML model training before data foundation complete

risks: persistedMarketRegimeResult coverage risk: if DB has < 500 days of MarketRegimeResult, many records will show MISSING regime context
Python T-05 skeleton coexists with T-05B TS skeleton — operator must use T-05B for TypeScript pipeline
Monthly rebalance skeleton is structural only — not equivalent to a complete backtest
rankCandidatesRuleOnly is alphabetical deterministic only — not a strategy recommendation
Weekday-only date generation is a simplification — a full Taiwan trading calendar is needed for production accuracy
